evidence: Browser test 'instrument typography...' asserts every [data-readout] fontVariantNumeric matches /tabular-nums/ (>=8 readouts) — green on Chromium AND WebKit (test:ux exit 0). Independent Playwright probe on Lab surface: all 17 [data-readout] nodes compute fontVariantNumeric='tabular-nums' and IBM Plex Mono.
Browser test cycles digits 0-9 through #backspinTruth: max-min width < 0.6px, green both engines. Independent probe: setting '0000'..'9999' yields width 93.91px for every digit, spread 0.000px.

academy-readout-format.js MINUS verified as U+2212 via codePointAt. Model unit test 'readout formatter owns U+2212' asserts formatNumber(-3)='−3', formatValue(-3,'°')='−3°', formatSigned(-216,' rpm')='−216 rpm' — passed. Browser typography test asserts readout text never matches /-\d/ (both engines). Probe rendered '−3°'.

Independent grep of academy-native-lesson.css: no font-family literal outside var()/inherit (NONE). Token file sa-p3.css has exactly 1 --font-ui and 1 --font-mono definition. flightglass-ux test 'instrument typography tokens' green.
Ran npm run test:perf (exit 0), regenerated JSON: chromium p95=3.4ms, webkit p95=8ms — both < 16.7ms budget, events=220 (>=200) per engine, zero page errors asserted in harness.

academy-native-lesson.js lines 754-768: ghost decay applied only via canvas context.globalAlpha + draw() onto the canvas trace; numbers are DOM. Browser test 'phosphor ghosts...never on numbers' asserts every [data-readout] computes animationName 'none' and transition none — green both engines.

academy-trace-state.js: MAX_GHOSTS=2, GHOST_OPACITIES=[0.4,0.16] (monotone falling, both >0). Model unit test 'phosphor trace state keeps at most two ghosts' asserts third settle evicts oldest (length===2, newest-first), plan opacities descending, reduced-motion yields single ghost opacity 1 — passed.

Browser test 'aperture signature transition' green both engines: normal motion -> data-last-transition='aperture', overlay aria-hidden=true and pointer-events=none, then hidden; reduced motion -> data-last-transition='fade' with live influence rows rendered (truth stays live).

Browser test 'rendered lesson surfaces carry zero gradient/glow/shadow/filter' walks all six surfaces auditing computed backgroundImage/boxShadow/textShadow/filter/backdropFilter = zero offenders, green both engines. flightglass-ux grep of lesson CSS (no box-shadow/text-shadow/-gradient(/backdrop-filter/filter:) and renderer (no createLinearGradient/createRadialGradient/shadowBlur/shadowColor/filter) clean. Independent probe on Lab: badRenderCount=0; independent greps returned NONE.
Browser test 'trace annotation right' asserts exactly one visible [data-trace-annotation] at initial state and re-asserts count===1 across a dynamicLoft state sweep (30,10,40) — green both engines.

Browser test asserts annotation value color == --accent (ember) not violet, primary truth == --accent, and real-world estimate band value == --secondary (violet) not ember — green both engines. Independent probe: #backspinTruth computes rgb(255,138,77) = --accent ember (#FF8A4D), --secondary=#9D8BFF.

Browser test 'all six surfaces stay intact at 130% text scale' sets root font-size 130%, verifies rem scaling ratio>1.25, then walks all six surfaces asserting scrollLeft=0, no doc horizontal overflow, no element clipping past viewport, no invisible vertical clipping — green both engines.

Browser test 'axe-core finds no critical or serious violations' runs axe-core (color-contrast enabled) on all six surfaces, asserts filtered critical/serious violations == [] — green on Chromium AND WebKit.

Browser test 'sliders speak plain-language values...debounce' asserts aria-valuetext='minus 3 degrees' and '120 miles per hour', and that 10 rapid input events produce <=3 live-region (#live) updates (never per-event) — green both engines.

flightglass-ux manifest test asserts config/flightglass-surfaces.json academy-lesson.requiredSelectors === [#nativeLesson, #missionStageBuild (Mission), #backspinTruth+#labRange (Lab), #masteryTask (Mastery), #nativeLessonResult (Result)] — all four surfaces covered; test passed.

Ran npm run test:visreg (exit 0): 48 approved baselines present (6 surfaces x 2 viewports x 2 motion modes x 2 engines) and every current render diffs <= 0.1% (DIFF_THRESHOLD_PCT=0.1) against baseline with zero size mismatches and error-free capture walk.

npm run test:webkit (--project=webkit) executed the full browser suite: 41 tests pass, 0 fail, exit 0 — including viewport fit at 430x932 and 375x812, 44px minimum target audits, keyboard-only completion, and failure-path tests (storage throws, canvas context unavailable, missing JPG, non-finite inputs, route cancellation).
